runs.ratchet_note: Iter 54 P64 green — reduce_dense_dynamic hoist BindingOrder match + unsafe pointer loads. Best of 3 runs (run 1: 70762.94, run 2: 77773.01, run 3: 70781.79); two past accept, one flat. -8.71% vs prior 77525.5 ratchet. Ratio 70762.94 / 3901.31 (core best run 3) = 18.14x (vs 19.68x prior).

standardization_note: New perf-loop standard: sha2-chain --num-iters 16 --log-t 16 (~2^16 cycles). Replaces muldiv log_t=12 standard effective 2026-04-19 per user direction.
